---
title: "Collections have moved"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
---

::: {.content-block .mn-legacy-note}
<p class="mn-kicker">NEW ORGANISATION</p>

## Topics now connect the main sections

Category labels connect writing, course resources, videos and projects without forcing one idea into a separate duplicate collection.

[Browse the Writing topics](../writing/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[See active projects](../projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
